title: Woman kidnapped, sexually assaulted
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 40-year-old woman was...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 40-year-old woman was allegedly forced from her KwaNonqaba home at gunpoint in the early hours of Sunday, 25 August, before she was driven around Mossel Bay for several hours and then to another location and sexually assaulted.


> A police spokesperson Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp says a case of rape and kidnapping has been opened and is being investigated by the Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences (FCS) Unit in Mossel Bay.


Kapp says that according to the woman's statement, a person came to her door just after 01:00 on Sunday. When the woman went to see who it was, the suspect allegedly forced the woman out of her house at gunpoint and into a car.

Read more on www.mosselbayadvertiser.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
